**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. …
2. …

**Expected behavior**
What you expected instead.

**Environment**
- Host OS: <!-- e.g. Arch Linux / macOS 14 -->
- Node version: <!-- node -v -->
- tmux version: <!-- tmux -V -->
- Client: <!-- iPhone Safari PWA / desktop Chrome / … -->
- Access: <!-- tailscale serve / direct / … -->

**Logs**
Server logs if relevant (`journalctl --user -u hyprterm` on Linux,
`~/Library/Logs/hyprterm.log` on macOS) and any browser console errors.
